default_tradition.description: Preferred religious corpus or tradition for default lookups.

default_bible_version.description: Preferred Bible translation code for Christian texts (e.g., KJV, NABRE, NRSV, ESV, Douay).

quran_translation_ids.description: Array of Qur’an translation IDs (e.g., [20] for Sahih International).

sefaria_lang.description: Language option for Sefaria API calls.

commentary_level.description: Amount of context or commentary to provide alongside quoted text.
